오늘의 영화 뉴스

마지막 업데이트: 2026년 05월 19일 09:00 (KST) · 총 50건

'앨리' 봉준호 "조지 밀러와 미야자키 하야오 뛰어넘고 싶다"'앨리' 봉준호 "조지 밀러와 미야자키 하야오 뛰어넘고 싶다" (한국어)
맥스무비 22시간 전

봉준호 감독의 첫 장편 애니메이션 영화 '앨리'의 한 장면. 사진제공=CJ ENM봉준호 감독이 영화 ‘매드맥스’ 시리즈의 연출자 조지 밀러 감독과 일본 애니메이션의 거장 미야자키 하야오를 뛰어넘고 싶다는 “야망”을 밝혀 눈길을 끈다. 봉 감독은 자신이 내년 선보일 첫 장편 애니메이션 영화 ‘앨리’(Ally)에 관한 포부를 드러내며 기대감을 높인다.봉준호 감봉준호 감독의 첫 장편 애니메이션 영화 '앨리'의 한 장면. 사진제공=CJ ENM봉준호 감독이 영화 ‘매드맥스’ 시리즈의 연출자 조지 밀러 감독과 일본 애니메이션의 거장 미야자키 하야오를 뛰어넘고 싶다는 “야망”을 밝혀 눈길을 끈다. 봉 감독은 자신이 내년 선보일 첫 장편 애니메이션 영화 ‘앨리’(Ally)에 관한 포부를 드러내며 기대감을 높인다.봉준호 감

의문의 안개가 미래 도시를 뒤덮고 치명적이면서도 정체를 알 수 없는 존재를 풀어놓자, 마음의 상처를 안고 살아가는 한 젊은 여성은 아버지를 찾아 ...의문의 안개가 미래 도시를 뒤덮고 치명적이면서도 정체를 알 수 없는 존재를 풀어놓자, 마음의 상처를 안고 살아가는 한 젊은 여성은 아버지를 찾아 ...

씨네21 16시간 전

2024년 3월, <씨네21>은 개관 3주차였던 성수동의 무비랜드를 찾아 극장주 모춘, 소호와 이야기를 나누었다. 그로부터 2년이 지난 뒤 무비랜드는 이제 영화를 좋아하는 이라면 당연히 알 법한 극장이자 하나의 브랜드로 자리 잡았다. 특히, 매달 새 큐레이터를 섭외해 그들의 선정작을 상영하는 기획은 무비랜드의 대표적 콘텐츠가 되어 전방위적 ...2024년 3월, <씨네21>은 개관 3주차였던 성수동의 무비랜드를 찾아 극장주 모춘, 소호와 이야기를 나누었다. 그로부터 2년이 지난 뒤 무비랜드는 이제 영화를 좋아하는 이라면 당연히 알 법한 극장이자 하나의 브랜드로 자리 잡았다. 특히, 매달 새 큐레이터를 섭외해 그들의 선정작을 상영하는 기획은 무비랜드의 대표적 콘텐츠가 되어 전방위적 ...

사진출처 YOUTUBE ‘SMTOWN’ 가수 aespa(에스파) 공개 2026년 5월11일 <WDA> 뮤직비디오는 꽤 무섭다. 처음부터 멤버 지젤이 재패니즈 호러풍의 고속도로 위 유령으로 등장하여 공포의 톤 앤드 매너를 형성한다. 이어지는 소녀와 까마귀의 추격전은 생성형 AI의 조악한 품질로 드러나며, 웹에 떠도는 온갖 찌꺼기 이미지들...사진출처 YOUTUBE ‘SMTOWN’ 가수 aespa(에스파) 공개 2026년 5월11일 <WDA> 뮤직비디오는 꽤 무섭다. 처음부터 멤버 지젤이 재패니즈 호러풍의 고속도로 위 유령으로 등장하여 공포의 톤 앤드 매너를 형성한다. 이어지는 소녀와 까마귀의 추격전은 생성형 AI의 조악한 품질로 드러나며, 웹에 떠도는 온갖 찌꺼기 이미지들...

씨네21 17시간 전

배우. 영화 <교생실습>, 드라마 <모두가 자신의 무가치함과 싸우고 있다> 등 출연 최근 나를 가장 들뜨게 한 극장 영화는? <씨너스: 죄인들> 사운드 좋고 큰 극장에서 봤는데, 음악이 귀를 때리고 차가 광활한 미국 대지를 달리는 장면에서 정말 짜릿했다. 신작이 나오면 무조건 챙겨보는 배우는? 전지현...배우. 영화 <교생실습>, 드라마 <모두가 자신의 무가치함과 싸우고 있다> 등 출연 최근 나를 가장 들뜨게 한 극장 영화는? <씨너스: 죄인들> 사운드 좋고 큰 극장에서 봤는데, 음악이 귀를 때리고 차가 광활한 미국 대지를 달리는 장면에서 정말 짜릿했다. 신작이 나오면 무조건 챙겨보는 배우는? 전지현...

[델리] 긴 러닝타임은 문제가 아니다 - <두란다르>의 속편 <두란다르: 더 리벤지>, 인도 박스오피스 흥행 신기록 쓸 예정[델리] 긴 러닝타임은 문제가 아니다 - <두란다르>의 속편 <두란다르: 더 리벤지>, 인도 박스오피스 흥행 신기록 쓸 예정 (한국어)

대가(두란다르)의 전략이 또 한번 인도를 접수했다. 연말연초 논란 속에 극장가를 강타했던 발리우드 액션 스릴러 <두란다르>의 속편 <두란다르: 더 리벤지>가 새 역사를 써내려가고 있다. 발리우드 역대 1위는 물론 남인도 극장가에서도 개가를 올리며 인도영화 흥행 순위에서 오랜 기간 1위를 지키고 있는 아미르 칸 주연의 <당...대가(두란다르)의 전략이 또 한번 인도를 접수했다. 연말연초 논란 속에 극장가를 강타했던 발리우드 액션 스릴러 <두란다르>의 속편 <두란다르: 더 리벤지>가 새 역사를 써내려가고 있다. 발리우드 역대 1위는 물론 남인도 극장가에서도 개가를 올리며 인도영화 흥행 순위에서 오랜 기간 1위를 지키고 있는 아미르 칸 주연의 <당...

EXCLUSIVE: Nancy Meyers has further expanded the cast of her new film for Warner Bros. with the addition of Tony Hale (Toy Story 5), Beverly D’Angelo (National Lampoon’s Vacation franchise), and newcomer Apple Martin. Character details are under wraps, as is the film’s logline. LISTEN: ‘Michael’ Returns to No. 1 at the Box Office as Exhibitors Brace for ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’ and the Start of Summer Blockbuster SeasonLISTEN: ‘Michael’ Returns to No. 1 at the Box Office as Exhibitors Brace for ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’ and the Start of Summer Blockbuster Season
Variety 3시간 전

On today’s episode of “Daily Variety” podcast, in our Box Office segment, Variety’s Rebecca Rubin explains why Lionsgate’s “Michael” made a surprise return to No. 1 in a weekend that marks the calm before the start of summer blockbuster season next week with Disney’s “The Mandalorian and Grogu” opening over Memorial Day weekend. “Summer movie […]On today’s episode of “Daily Variety” podcast, in our Box Office segment, Variety’s Rebecca Rubin explains why Lionsgate’s “Michael” made a surprise return to No. 1 in a weekend that marks the calm before the start of summer blockbuster season next week with Disney’s “The Mandalorian and Grogu” opening over Memorial Day weekend. “Summer movie […]

New Line And Warner Bros. Pictures Animation Set Directors For New ‘Hello Kitty’ MovieNew Line And Warner Bros. Pictures Animation Set Directors For New ‘Hello Kitty’ Movie
Deadline 6시간 전

Sanrio’s Hello Kitty feature film from New Line Cinema and Warner Bros. Pictures Animation has tapped directors David Derrick Jr. and John Aoshima to helm. Beau Flynn is producing and the project has recently added Ramsay Naito joining as well. Shelby Thomas is overseeing for FlynnPictureCo. The film will be distributed globally by Warner Bros. Pictures […]Sanrio’s Hello Kitty feature film from New Line Cinema and Warner Bros. Pictures Animation has tapped directors David Derrick Jr. and John Aoshima to helm. Beau Flynn is producing and the project has recently added Ramsay Naito joining as well. Shelby Thomas is overseeing for FlynnPictureCo. The film will be distributed globally by Warner Bros. Pictures […]

Pictures Animation are behind the theatrical feature that adapts the Sanrio property and is set to hit the big screen in 2028.

Deadline 7시간 전

Bette Midler will wave her magic wand – when she’s actually got control of it – in Netflix’s reimagined Cinderella movie Steps. She will voice the fairy godmother in the animated pic, which is the first fully in-house produced film from Netflix Animation Studios. Deadline 7시간 전

The first neon-hued trailer for Nicolas Winding Refn’s Her Private Hell was released today just hours before the film’s premiere in Cannes. The cast includes Yellowjackets star Sophie Thatcher and Riverdale hunk Charles Melton. The movie has myriad storylines, but is set in a future metropolis. ‘Full Phil’ Review: With Woody Harrelson and Kristen Stewart Locked in a Father-Daughter Hatefest, Will Quentin Dupieux’s Latest Bizarro-World Lark Be His Crossover Movie?‘Full Phil’ Review: With Woody Harrelson and Kristen Stewart Locked in a Father-Daughter Hatefest, Will Quentin Dupieux’s Latest Bizarro-World Lark Be His Crossover Movie?
Variety 40분 전

"Full Phil," brash and throttling as it is, is an overly italicized screw-loose satire that some will want to see, because in its halfway funny, halfway off-putting extreme way it dares to color so far outside the lines."Full Phil," brash and throttling as it is, is an overly italicized screw-loose satire that some will want to see, because in its halfway funny, halfway off-putting extreme way it dares to color so far outside the lines.

Variety 1시간 전

Stephen Colbert’s time with “The Late Show” won’t end when the final episode tapes at the Ed Sullivan Theater in New York City on Thursday. Shirtless Charles Melton, Brutal Murders and Daddy Issues: Nicolas Winding Refn’s ‘Her Private Hell’ Slays Cannes Crowd With 7-Minute OvationShirtless Charles Melton, Brutal Murders and Daddy Issues: Nicolas Winding Refn’s ‘Her Private Hell’ Slays Cannes Crowd With 7-Minute Ovation
Variety 1시간 전

Nicolas Winding Refn returned to Cannes with “Her Private Hell” and continued his festival hot streak of dividing audiences. The provocateur’s latest feature is headlined by “Yellowjackets” and “Companion” star Sophie Thatcher and Charles Melton, the “Riverdale” actor who redefined his career at Cannes when Todd Haynes’ “May December” premiered in 2023. The late-night screening […]Nicolas Winding Refn returned to Cannes with “Her Private Hell” and continued his festival hot streak of dividing audiences. The provocateur’s latest feature is headlined by “Yellowjackets” and “Companion” star Sophie Thatcher and Charles Melton, the “Riverdale” actor who redefined his career at Cannes when Todd Haynes’ “May December” premiered in 2023. The late-night screening […]

Nicolas Winding Refn’s ‘Her Private Hell’ Heats Up Cannes With 12-Minute Standing OvationNicolas Winding Refn’s ‘Her Private Hell’ Heats Up Cannes With 12-Minute Standing Ovation
Deadline 1시간 전

Monday night belonged to Nicolas Winding Refn at Cannes and though his trippy psychedelic female ensemble pic, Her Private Hell, is playing out of competition, it spiced up the Grand Theatre Lumiere with a 12-minute standing ovation, the second such of the night after Fjord. Those are the longest plaudits of the festival, though Refn […]Monday night belonged to Nicolas Winding Refn at Cannes and though his trippy psychedelic female ensemble pic, Her Private Hell, is playing out of competition, it spiced up the Grand Theatre Lumiere with a 12-minute standing ovation, the second such of the night after Fjord. Those are the longest plaudits of the festival, though Refn […]

‘Greyhound’ DP Shelly Johnson Elected President of American Society of Cinematographers‘Greyhound’ DP Shelly Johnson Elected President of American Society of Cinematographers
Variety 3시간 전

“Greyhound” and “Jurassic Park III” DP Shelly Johnson has been elected the 50th President of the American Society of Cinematographers. The ASC board of governors has announced a new slate of officers. Johnson, who takes the reigns from incumbent President Mandy Walker, previously served as the org’s president from 2023-25. The Board also voted in Vice […]“Greyhound” and “Jurassic Park III” DP Shelly Johnson has been elected the 50th President of the American Society of Cinematographers. The ASC board of governors has announced a new slate of officers. Johnson, who takes the reigns from incumbent President Mandy Walker, previously served as the org’s president from 2023-25. The Board also voted in Vice […]

Deadline 4시간 전

Palme d’Or winner Cristian Mungiu‘s latest film Fjord, starring Sebastian Stan (The Apprentice) and Renate Reinsve (Sentimental Value), had its world premiere in Cannes on Monday night and received a 12-minute ovation. The runners-up ovation-wise at this point in the festival are James Gray’s Paper Tiger, which last night got a 10-minute salute, and Ryusuke Hamaguchi’s […]Palme d’Or winner Cristian Mungiu‘s latest film Fjord, starring Sebastian Stan (The Apprentice) and Renate Reinsve (Sentimental Value), had its world premiere in Cannes on Monday night and received a 12-minute ovation. Sebastian Stan and Renate Reinsve Shed Tears as Devastating Family Drama ‘Fjord’ Gets 10-Minute Cannes Premiere Standing OvationSebastian Stan and Renate Reinsve Shed Tears as Devastating Family Drama ‘Fjord’ Gets 10-Minute Cannes Premiere Standing Ovation
Variety 4시간 전

The Cannes Film Festival flipped for “Fjord” on Monday night, as Cristian Mungiu’s heart-wrenching family legal saga starring Sebastian Stan and Renate Reinsve brought searing drama to the Grand Palais. A Romanian family with strict religious beliefs emigrates to a sleepy Norwegian village — watching as clashing social norms escalates into a living nightmare when […]The Cannes Film Festival flipped for “Fjord” on Monday night, as Cristian Mungiu’s heart-wrenching family legal saga starring Sebastian Stan and Renate Reinsve brought searing drama to the Grand Palais. A Romanian family with strict religious beliefs emigrates to a sleepy Norwegian village — watching as clashing social norms escalates into a living nightmare when […]

Joshua and Rebecca Tickell Win Golden Globes Prize for Documentary at Cannes Film FestivalJoshua and Rebecca Tickell Win Golden Globes Prize for Documentary at Cannes Film Festival
Variety 4시간 전

Husband-and-wife filmmaking duo Joshua and Rebecca Tickell were jointly awarded the Golden Globes Prize for Documentary in Partnership With Artemis Rising Foundation during the 79th edition of the Cannes Film Festival. Their film “Groundswell” follows experts, Indigenous leaders and farmers across five continents, demonstrating how regenerative farming can restore soil health, draw carbon from the […]Husband-and-wife filmmaking duo Joshua and Rebecca Tickell were jointly awarded the Golden Globes Prize for Documentary in Partnership With Artemis Rising Foundation during the 79th edition of the Cannes Film Festival. Deadline 4시간 전

Nicolas Winding Refn has historically turned down offers for notable Hollywood films, but if he got the shot to do a DC movie, “I would love to do Batgirl” he tells Deadline. The Hollywood Reporter 5시간 전

Over the past year, the Gen Z auteur has become the most in-demand 20-something filmmaker in Hollywood, with 'Texas Chainsaw Massacre' waiting in the wings and the Jason Blum, Roy Lee production 'Anything But Ghosts' already shot.Over the past year, the Gen Z auteur has become the most in-demand 20-something filmmaker in Hollywood, with 'Texas Chainsaw Massacre' waiting in the wings and the Jason Blum, Roy Lee production 'Anything But Ghosts' already shot.

Variety 6시간 전

First, on Saturday night, Spaniard Rodrigo Sorogoyen’s “The Beloved,” starring Javier Bardem and Victoria Luengo, scored some of the best reviews of any competition title to date this year at the Cannes Film Festival. ‘Fjord’ Cannes Film Festival Premiere Photos: Renate Reinsve, Sebastian Stan, Sharon Stone, Stellan Skarsgård, Daisy Edgar-Jones & More‘Fjord’ Cannes Film Festival Premiere Photos: Renate Reinsve, Sebastian Stan, Sharon Stone, Stellan Skarsgård, Daisy Edgar-Jones & More
Deadline 6시간 전

The Cannes Film Festival hosted the world premiere of Fjord, the latest film from director Cristian Mungiu.  Mungiu was joined by the stars of the film, including Sebastian Stan, Renate Reinsve, Markus Tønseth, Lisa Loven Kongsli, Jonathan Ciprian Breazu, Henrikke Lund Olsen, Vanessa Ceban, and Lisa Carlehed, who all walked the red carpet at the Grand […]The Cannes Film Festival hosted the world premiere of Fjord, the latest film from director Cristian Mungiu.  Mungiu was joined by the stars of the film, including Sebastian Stan, Renate Reinsve, Markus Tønseth, Lisa Loven Kongsli, Jonathan Ciprian Breazu, Henrikke Lund Olsen, Vanessa Ceban, and Lisa Carlehed, who all walked the red carpet at the Grand […]

‘Fjord’ Review: Sebastian Stan And Renate Reinsve In Cristian Mungiu’s Masterful Drama Of Our Polarized Times – Cannes Film Festival‘Fjord’ Review: Sebastian Stan And Renate Reinsve In Cristian Mungiu’s Masterful Drama Of Our Polarized Times – Cannes Film Festival
Deadline 6시간 전

In his typical spare and deliberate style, Romanian director Cristian Mungiu has crafted yet another Palme d’Or-worthy film that fearlessly treads into controversial issues in our society but pointedly doesn’t take sides. This may frustrate people who want it to, but Fjord is a fiercely intelligent and gripping movie that finds its power in providing […]In his typical spare and deliberate style, Romanian director Cristian Mungiu has crafted yet another Palme d’Or-worthy film that fearlessly treads into controversial issues in our society but pointedly doesn’t take sides. This may frustrate people who want it to, but Fjord is a fiercely intelligent and gripping movie that finds its power in providing […]

Cannes Film Festival 2026: Read All Of Deadline’s Movie ReviewsCannes Film Festival 2026: Read All Of Deadline’s Movie Reviews
Deadline 6시간 전

The 2026 Cannes Film Festival is underway with French filmmaker Pierre Salvadori’s The Electric Kiss serving as the opening-night pic. Among the headline filmmakers debuting new works on the Croisette this year are previous Palme d’Or winners Cristian Mungiu and Hirokazu Kore-eda, two-time Oscar-winning Iranian director Asghar Farhadi and American indie veteran Ira Sachs. The […]The 2026 Cannes Film Festival is underway with French filmmaker Pierre Salvadori’s The Electric Kiss serving as the opening-night pic. Among the headline filmmakers debuting new works on the Croisette this year are previous Palme d’Or winners Cristian Mungiu and Hirokazu Kore-eda, two-time Oscar-winning Iranian director Asghar Farhadi and American indie veteran Ira Sachs.
